race.comment: SAVAHAY (3) got off the mark on the home track three back and has since followed it up with some strong runs home without threatening the winner. Easier here and gets an important 3kg claim from a middle draw. Expect him to prove hard to stop. LUCY LULU (9) has been slightly disappointing this time in work but looks to have found a more suitable race today. Gets the gun hoop Brodie Loy on board now and with 4 weeks between runs, she can bounce back to form. MAYFAIR HOTEL (12) never got involved last start but was better the run before when in the placings at Leeton. Not dismissing completely. FLEET DESTINATION (13) best of the rest.
